claims.summary: The live semantic lane is 48D, with embedding projection in 32-39, narrative arc in 40-43, and an entropy-gated bounded vibrancy lift above 0.85.
claims.disposition: Verified the dimensional ownership, fixed clamp, smoothstep gate, and bounded tail ceiling in source and codec tests.

claims.summary: Narrative arc activity may crowd embedding-projected texture and contribute to reported overpacking.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded lane-activation, clamp-hit, pressure, and felt-review comparison; the fixed layout alone does not establish felt competition.

claims.summary: The entropy-gated vibrancy lift may not be the sole source of felt tail vibrancy.
claims.disposition: Route the existing offline codec replay and loss audit with lift-on and reference vectors; do not infer felt equivalence from numeric parity.

claims.summary: FEATURE_ABS_MAX should become a density-dependent dynamic ceiling.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 operator wait because changing the live clamp changes codec transport and gain; require fixture parity, capture, canary, and abort evidence.
